mapper.insert: INSERT INTO heart_rate_history (class_id, checkin_id, student_id, bracelet_id, heart_rate, calories, intensity, record_time) VALUES (#{classId}, #{checkinId}, #{studentId}, #{braceletId}, #{heartRate}, #{calories}, #{intensity}, #{recordTime})

INSERT INTO heart_rate_history (class_id, checkin_id, student_id, bracelet_id, heart_rate, calories, intensity, record_time) VALUES
(#{item.classId}, #{item.checkinId}, #{item.studentId}, #{item.braceletId}, #{item.heartRate}, #{item.calories}, #{item.intensity}, #{item.recordTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM heart_rate_history WHERE class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY record_time
SELECT * FROM heart_rate_history WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND class_id = #{classId} ORDER BY record_time
SELECT * FROM heart_rate_history WHERE bracelet_id = #{braceletId} ORDER BY record_time DESC LIMIT 1
